summary: Iteration 144: KDS (Kitchen Display System) Expo Command Screen + AI³ LLM-backed synthesis + AI³ NLP chat expansion - All 35 backend tests passed. Tested 15 new KDS endpoints with 11 stations and 3 modes (restaurant/ird/banquet). LLM narrative synthesis via Claude Sonnet 4.5 working in /api/intelligence/ai3/summary and /aurium/gm. AI³ NLP chat expanded with OPS SNAPSHOT context covering HSKP/ENG/FOH/CONCIERGE/SPA/IRD/KDS/GUEST360. No MongoDB _id leaks. All regression tests for prior modules passed.
critical_code_review_comments: KDS module properly uses _strip() helper and {'_id': 0} projection to prevent MongoDB _id leaks
LLM narrative synthesis in intelligence_adapter.py gracefully handles failures (returns None instead of crashing)
AI³ NLP chat context expansion in ai3_nlp.py covers all new modules with keyword-specific expansions
Sequential fire policy correctly fires only first course items on ticket creation

verified_features.KDS_seed_idempotent: PASS - POST /api/kds/seed seeds 11 stations + demo tickets (restaurant/ird/banquet)
verified_features.KDS_stations_with_health: PASS - GET /api/kds/stations returns 11 stations with health color (green/yellow/red) and suggested_action
verified_features.KDS_expo_full_payload: PASS - GET /api/kds/expo returns top_bar (active_tickets, danger, aging_counts, avg_ticket_seconds, longest, eighty_six_count, pacing_drift_min), station_health array, tickets array with cards, allday array, eighty_six
verified_features.KDS_expo_mode_restaurant: PASS - GET /api/kds/expo?mode=restaurant filters to restaurant tickets only
verified_features.KDS_expo_mode_ird: PASS - GET /api/kds/expo?mode=ird filters to IRD tickets only
verified_features.KDS_expo_mode_banquet: PASS - GET /api/kds/expo?mode=banquet filters to banquet tickets only
verified_features.KDS_station_grill_queue: PASS - GET /api/kds/station/grill returns station queue sorted by VIP first then age desc
verified_features.KDS_create_ticket_sequential_fire: PASS - POST /api/kds/tickets with sequential fire policy only fires first course items
verified_features.KDS_bump_item_auto_fulfill: PASS - POST /api/kds/tickets/{id}/bump-item marks item bumped; auto-fulfills ticket if all items bumped
verified_features.KDS_fire_course: PASS - POST /api/kds/tickets/{id}/fire-course advances to next course, fires items with status=new
verified_features.KDS_recall_ticket: PASS - POST /api/kds/tickets/{id}/recall reverts bumped items to working, status → working
verified_features.KDS_allday: PASS - GET /api/kds/allday returns rolled-up item counts with new_qty/working_qty/ready_qty/vip_qty/allergy_variants
verified_features.KDS_pacing: PASS - GET /api/kds/pacing returns avg_ticket_minutes, drift_minutes, foh_suggestion string when drift > 3
verified_features.KDS_86_crud: PASS - POST /api/kds/86 and GET /api/kds/86 work correctly
verified_features.INTEL_ai3_summary_llm: PASS - GET /api/intelligence/ai3/summary?use_llm=true returns narrative field with Claude-generated text (807 chars)
verified_features.AI3_NLP_rooms_query: PASS - POST /api/ai3/ask with 'how many rooms are ready?' returns response mentioning rooms/ready count
verified_features.AI3_NLP_foh_outlets_query: PASS - POST /api/ai3/ask with 'what FOH outlets exist?' returns response mentioning outlets
verified_features.AI3_NLP_kds_tickets_query: PASS - POST /api/ai3/ask with 'how many active KDS tickets' references KDS kitchen
verified_features.AI3_NLP_engineering_query: PASS - POST /api/ai3/ask with 'list open engineering work orders' includes work order context

seed_data_creation: Used seed endpoints: POST /api/kds/seed (11 stations + demo tickets across 3 modes). Created test tickets with TEST_ prefix for CRUD operations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 144 adds: (1) KDS (Kitchen Display System) - 15 endpoints at /api/kds/* for Expo Command Screen with 11 stations (grill, saute, pantry, pastry, pizza, fryer, cold, expo, ird-assembly, banquet-plating, pool-kitchen), 3 modes (restaurant/ird/banquet), ticket lifecycle (create/bump-item/fire-course/hold/recall/fulfill/reroute), allday roll-up, pacing drift, 86 list. Sequential fire policy fires only first course on ticket creation. (2) LLM-backed narrative synthesis in /api/intelligence/ai3/summary and /aurium/gm using Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. Narrative field may be null if LLM times out - graceful fallback. (3) AI³ NLP chat expansion in /api/ai3/ask with OPS SNAPSHOT context covering all command centers (HSKP/ENG/FOH/CONCIERGE/SPA/IRD/KDS/GUEST360) plus keyword-specific expansions. NOTE: The AI3 NLP endpoint is /api/ai3/ask (not /api/ai3-nlp/chat as mentioned in test request).
